title: Tangy Mediterranean Semolina Stir-fry
description: A tangy and creamy mediterranean dish featuring semolina flour that is both ferment-friendly and suitable for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.amount: 2 tablespoons fresh squeezed from organic lemons

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine semolina flour with minced garlic and red pepper flakes. Stir in olive oil to create a paste.
Add lemon juice to the mixture and continue stirring until a smooth sauce forms.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Once hot, add more olive oil if necessary.
Pour the semolina sauce into the skillet and stir continuously for 1 minute or until semolina is slightly thickened.
Fold in chopped spinach leaves and feta cheese. Cook for an additional 2 minutes until greens wilt and everything is evenly distributed.
Remove from heat immediately to prevent burning. Serve hot.
